title: rosa viscaria var. mesocarpa
intro: Rosa viscaria var. mesocarpa, also known as alpenrose or Alpine rose, is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. mesocarpa include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
